frictions.description: MCP search_code tool uses current working directory to find .vera index, not a 'path' argument. The 'path' parameter in search_code schema is a path glob filter, not project path. Must cd into the test repo before piping to vera mcp.
frictions.resolution: Changed MCP invocation to cd into /tmp/vera-test-cross/flask before piping to vera mcp, instead of passing path in arguments
